steps.observed: 200 returned with 1367 tokens, each with chainId, address, name, symbol, decimals, logoURI fields

evidence.network: GET /tokenlist -> 200, response body has tokens array (1367 items) with fields: chainId, address, name, symbol, decimals, logoURI, extensions

assertions.title: Autocomplete shows tokens for current chain

steps.observed: Chain selector set to Ethereum (1)
Dropdown appeared with 15 Ethereum-chain tokens matching 'USD' (BUSD, GUSD, LUSD, MUSD, PYUSD, etc.)

steps.expected: Dropdown shows only Base chain tokens
steps.observed: Dropdown showed 2 Base-chain tokens: USDbC, USDC

steps.action: Type 'USD' in From field on Ethereum chain
steps.expected: Tokens matching by name (e.g. 'Binance USD', 'USD Coin') shown
steps.observed: 15 tokens shown including BUSD (Binance USD), GUSD (Gemini Dollar), LUSD (Liquity USD), MUSD (mStable USD), PYUSD (PayPal USD), USDC (USD Coin)

steps.action: Type 'WETH' in From field on Ethereum chain
steps.observed: Exactly 1 result: WETH (Wrapped Ether) with address 0xC02aaA39b223FE8D0A0e5C4F27eAD9083C756Cc2

steps.action: Type partial address '0xA0b8699' in From field
steps.observed: USDC (USD Coin) shown as match for partial address
Exactly 1 result: USDC

steps.expected: No dropdown or raw address accepted
steps.observed: No dropdown shown (0 items), field retains the typed address for manual entry

assertions.title: Selecting a token fills the address field

steps.observed: USDC shown in dropdown

steps.expected: From field filled with USDC address
steps.observed: From field value set to 0xA0b86991c6218b36c1d19D4a2e9Eb0cE3606eB48

assertions.title: Changing chain updates autocomplete and defaults

steps.expected: From/To fields have Ethereum default tokens
steps.observed: From: 0xA0b86991c6218b36c1d19D4a2e9Eb0cE3606eB48 (USDC), To: 0xC02aaA39b223FE8D0A0e5C4F27eAD9083C756Cc2 (WETH)

steps.expected: From/To fields update to Base chain defaults

steps.observed: 2 results: USDbC (USD Base Coin), USDC (USD Coin) - all Base chain tokens

steps.action: Type 'USD' on Ethereum chain and observe dropdown
steps.expected: Token logos shown alongside name and symbol
steps.observed: Screenshots confirm logos displayed for BUSD, GUSD, LUSD, MUSD, PYUSD, RLUSD. Each autocomplete item shows logo image, bold symbol, name, and address. Logo onerror handler hides broken images gracefully.

steps.action: Enter non-listed PEPE token address 0x6982508145454Ce325dDbE47a25d4ec3d2311933 in From field
steps.observed: Address entered successfully, no dropdown shown (not in tokenlist)

steps.action: Submit compare request via curl with manual address
steps.observed: GET /compare -> 200 (response included spandex_error and curve_error as expected for an unusual token pair, but the request was processed successfully)

steps.expected: No dropdown or 'No tokens found' message, no JS errors
steps.observed: Dropdown did not appear (0 items, list not shown). No JavaScript console errors.

assertions.title: Tokenlist fetched on page load and replaces built-in list

steps.action: Reload page and check network requests
steps.expected: GET /tokenlist request fired on page load
steps.observed: Network log shows 'GET http://localhost:3001/tokenlist (fetch)' immediately after page document load
grep for 'BUILTIN_TOKENS' in HTML source returned 0 matches

steps.expected: Autocomplete shows tokens from fetched tokenlist
steps.observed: Typing 'USD' shows 15 Ethereum tokens from the fetched Uniswap tokenlist (1367 total tokens)

evidence.network: GET /tokenlist on page load confirmed in network requests log

assertions.title: URL parameters updated with token selection

steps.action: Select USDC via autocomplete in From field
steps.observed: From field set to 0xA0b86991c6218b36c1d19D4a2e9Eb0cE3606eB48

steps.action: Select WETH via autocomplete in To field
steps.observed: To field set to 0xC02aaA39b223FE8D0A0e5C4F27eAD9083C756Cc2

steps.expected: URL updated with token addresses as search params
steps.observed: URL updated to: http://localhost:3001/?chainId=1&from=0xA0b86991c6218b36c1d19D4a2e9Eb0cE3606eB48&to=0xC02aaA39b223FE8D0A0e5C4F27eAD9083C756Cc2&amount=1000&slippageBps=50

frictions.description: data/tokenlist.json was missing on disk (not committed to git due to Droid-Shield false positives). Had to run the init.sh download step (curl https://tokens.uniswap.org) to create it before the /tokenlist endpoint would work.
frictions.resolution: Downloaded tokenlist from Uniswap as specified in .factory/init.sh

frictions.description: agent-browser fill command sometimes caused the page to navigate to about:blank, requiring re-opening the URL. Workaround was to use eval-based DOM manipulation for field interactions.
frictions.resolution: Used agent-browser eval with direct DOM manipulation (input.value = ..., dispatchEvent) instead of fill command for reliable form interaction

summary: Tested 12 assertions: all 12 passed. Token autocomplete works correctly: fetches tokenlist on page load, filters by name/symbol/address, shows logos, handles chain switching with updated defaults, accepts manual address entry, handles empty results gracefully, and updates URL parameters after quote comparison.
